title: Credential and Secret Protection
description: Understand why credentials must never be shared with AI tools.

scenarios.title: API Key in Debug Request
scenarios.description: Your API call is failing. You want AI help debugging. Which approach is safe?
scenarios.unsafe_example: My API call to https://internal.coca-cola.com/api with key sk_live_abc123 returns 403. Help me fix it.
scenarios.safe_example: My API call returns a 403 Forbidden error. What are common causes and fixes for this status code?
scenarios.explanation: Never share API keys, tokens, or internal URLs. Describe the problem generically.

quiz.question: You find a bug and want AI help. Your code contains an API key. What do you do?
options: Paste the code as-is for accurate help
Replace the API key with a placeholder before pasting
It's fine because AI tools don't store data
Ask the AI to ignore the key
quiz.correct_answer: Replace the API key with a placeholder before pasting
quiz.explanation: Always replace credentials with placeholders like [API_KEY] before sharing code with AI tools.
